title: Unizen - Rekt
relevance_summary: Unverified external call vulnerability exploited after a contract upgrade

prevention.rule: Block any tx that makes an unverified external call immediately after a contract upgrade.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that makes an unverified external call immediately after a contract upgrade.
summary: Unizen experienced a series of attacks exploiting an unverified external call vulnerability shortly after a contract upgrade. A malicious actor took advantage of this to steal over $2.1M in funds. A guard could have detected and blocked these transactions by monitoring for unverified external calls following contract upgrades.
